name: Chart
description: Declarative chart wrapper over ECharts — 30+ types supported.

api.name: Chart
api.description: Declarative chart wrapper over ECharts — 30+ types supported.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: When true, forces the loading state on top of the chart (consumer is refetching data). Independent of the JS-driven ECharts loading indicator controlled by ShowLoading.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingSkeleton
parameters.description: When true (default), renders the loading state while the chart has not yet rendered for the first time, and whenever IsLoading is true. Set to false to opt out entirely.

parameters.name: SkeletonKind
parameters.description: Shape family for the skeleton. Each chart wrapper presets a sensible default (bars for Bar, pie ring for Pie, etc.) — consumers only override when they want a different silhouette.

parameters.name: SkeletonStyle
parameters.description: Phantom (default) renders the real chart with synthesized placeholder data in a muted palette; ECharts animates the option swap to real data. Silhouette falls back to the legacy SVG overlay skeleton.

parameters.name: PhantomCycleMs
parameters.description: Phantom-mode refresh interval in milliseconds — each tick regenerates the placeholder dataset with a new random seed so bars/lines/slices visibly redistribute while loading. Defaults to 1400ms; clamped to ≥200ms.

parameters.name: PhantomShapeOverride
parameters.description: Explicit override for the phantom layout (category count, series count, stacking, area fill). When null (default), the shape is inferred from the real Option so the phantom mirrors the actual chart structure.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingLabel
parameters.description: When true (default), overlays a small top-right pill containing a spinner and LoadingText on top of the active skeleton — a clear, always-on visual cue that the chart is loading. The pill renders independently of SkeletonStyle so phantom and silhouette both get the same hint. Set to false for bare visuals where the skeleton speaks for itself.

parameters.name: LoadingText
parameters.description: Label rendered next to the spinner inside the loading pill. Set to null or empty to hide the text and show only the spinner. Defaults to "Loading…".

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: When true, overlays a shape-aware loading skeleton on top of the chart (consumer is fetching data). Flips back to the real chart once set to false.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingSkeleton
parameters.description: When true (default), renders a shape-aware skeleton while the chart has not yet mounted and whenever IsLoading is true. Set to false to opt out.

parameters.name: SkeletonKind
parameters.description: Shape family for the loading skeleton. Defaults to ChartSkeletonKind.Area for this chart type; override if you want a different silhouette.

parameters.name: SkeletonStyle
parameters.description: Phantom (default) renders the real chart with placeholder data and morphs to real data via ECharts' option-change animation. Silhouette falls back to the legacy SVG skeleton overlay.

parameters.name: PhantomCycleMs
parameters.description: Phantom-mode refresh interval in milliseconds. Lower = faster data cycling while loading. Defaults to 1400.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingLabel
parameters.description: When true (default), shows a small "Loading…" pill in the top-right corner whenever IsLoading is active. Works on top of any SkeletonStyle.

parameters.name: LoadingText
parameters.description: Label rendered next to the spinner inside the loading pill. Set to empty to hide. Defaults to "Loading…".

parameters.name: LabelStrategy
parameters.description: Controls category-axis label rendering. Smart auto-rotates at higher densities; ShowAll forces all horizontal; Auto thins overlapping labels.

parameters.name: LabelRotate
parameters.description: Manual rotation override (degrees) for category-axis labels.

parameters.name: LabelStrategy
parameters.description: Controls how category-axis labels are rendered. Smart (default): show every label; auto-rotate -30° at 11–16 categories, -60° at 17–24, -75° above 24. ShowAll: force every label with no rotation (may overlap on dense datasets). Auto: let ECharts auto-thin labels that would overlap (original ECharts default — hides every second label when crowded).

parameters.name: LabelRotate
parameters.description: Manual override for category-label rotation in degrees (e.g. -30, -45). When set, takes precedence over the rotation implied by LabelStrategy.

enums.name: BarLabelStrategy
enums.description: Back-compat alias for ChartLabelStrategy. The enum was originally defined per-chart as BarChart.BarLabelStrategy; it now lives in the shared ChartLabelHelper. Existing references continue to compile via this alias.

# Chart

Declarative chart wrapper over ECharts — 30+ types supported.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Charts` · **Category:** Data Display/Charts
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/chart

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |

| Chart | IsLoading | `bool` | `` | When true, forces the loading state on top of the chart (consumer is refetching data). Independent of the JS-driven ECharts loading indicator controlled by ShowLoading. |
| Chart | ShowLoadingSkeleton | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), renders the loading state while the chart has not yet rendered for the first time, and whenever IsLoading is true. Set to false to opt out entirely. |
| Chart | SkeletonKind | `ChartSkeletonKind` | `ChartSkeletonKind.Generic` | Shape family for the skeleton. Each chart wrapper presets a sensible default (bars for Bar, pie ring for Pie, etc.) — consumers only override when they want a different silhouette. |
| Chart | SkeletonStyle | `ChartSkeletonStyle` | `ChartSkeletonStyle.Phantom` | Phantom (default) renders the real chart with synthesized placeholder data in a muted palette; ECharts animates the option swap to real data. Silhouette falls back to the legacy SVG overlay skeleton. |
| Chart | PhantomCycleMs | `int` | `1400` | Phantom-mode refresh interval in milliseconds — each tick regenerates the placeholder dataset with a new random seed so bars/lines/slices visibly redistribute while loading. Defaults to 1400ms; clamped to ≥200ms. |
| Chart | PhantomShapeOverride | `PhantomShape?` | `` | Explicit override for the phantom layout (category count, series count, stacking, area fill). When null (default), the shape is inferred from the real Option so the phantom mirrors the actual chart structure. |
| Chart | ShowLoadingLabel | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), overlays a small top-right pill containing a spinner and LoadingText on top of the active skeleton — a clear, always-on visual cue that the chart is loading. The pill renders independently of SkeletonStyle so phantom and silhouette both get the same hint. Set to false for bare visuals where the skeleton speaks for itself. |
| Chart | LoadingText | `string?` | `"Loading…"` | Label rendered next to the spinner inside the loading pill. Set to null or empty to hide the text and show only the spinner. Defaults to "Loading…". |
